# Muzamil Khan - Real Estate Agent

> Licensed California real estate agent (DRE #02400805) specializing in buyer representation across the East Bay. Based in Oakland, serving El Cerrito, Albany, Berkeley, Kensington, and surrounding cities.

## About
Muzamil Khan is a buyer's agent at Rise Group with a background in enterprise sales and an MBA from UC Davis. He combines data-driven analysis and negotiation experience to help buyers win in competitive Bay Area markets.

## Specialties
- First-time homebuyers in the East Bay
- Investor clients and fix-and-flip acquisitions
- Comparative market analysis
- Off-market deal sourcing

## Service Area
El Cerrito, Albany, Berkeley, Kensington, Richmond, Oakland, Alameda County, Contra Costa County, California

## Contact
- Email: Muzamil@risegroup.com
- Phone: 415-819-8312
